form.title: Welcome back.
form.subtitle: Sign in to keep an eye on the fleet — drivers, routes, and live position updates, all in one place.

errors.title: Couldn't sign you in
errors.fallback: Your email or password doesn't match our records.
errors.checkCredentials: Check the credentials for {{email}} and try again.

signup.title: Create your workspace.
signup.subtitle: Set up FleetTrack for your team — drivers, routes, and live positions, all up and running in minutes.
signup.workspaceIdHint: Unique slug (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)
signup.agreeTerms: I agree to the terms of service and privacy policy

validation.slugInvalid: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens (3–30 chars, no leading or trailing hyphen)
validation.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

errors.title: Couldn't create your workspace
errors.workspaceTaken: That workspace ID is already taken. Please choose a different one.
errors.fallback: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.workspaceUnavailable: Pick an available workspace ID before continuing.
